attacking_style: Launches decisive attacks in the final 2km of summit finishes, exploiting late-race opportunities when given freedom to hunt stages.
team_tactics: Receives stage-hunting freedom when team leadership situation changes (e.g., leader withdrawal). Benefits from team loyalty rewarded with personal opportunities.
terrain_preference: Summit finishes and uphill arrivals where late acceleration on climbs can create winning margins. Final climb scenarios suit best.
vulnerability: Likely constrained when in pure domestique role supporting GC leader; limited data on abilities in longer-range attacks or flat sprint scenarios.
key_patterns: Attacks in final 2km of climbs when stage opportunity available (1 observation)
Stage wins come when released from GC support duties (1 observation)
Executes team plan while others target GC bonuses simultaneously (1 observation)
form_trajectory: positive: Solo stage win demonstrates strong climbing form and finishing ability when given team freedom
